MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HING TSE, HING TSE, and, WILLIAM TSE'S Second Amended Notice of Motion to Quash service of summons and complaint. Alan L. Pitcaithley, Esq. of Pitcaithley & Hobbs (619) 698-0977, Appearing thru CourtCall, for Plaintiff. There are no other appearances. There is no argument.
